'''''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope''''', also referred to as '''''Star Wars Trilogy: A New Hope''''', is a [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] junior novel written by [[Ryder Windham]], based on a story and screenplay by [[George Lucas]]. It adapts the [[1977]] film [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']], and it was first published in [[October]] [[2004]] by [[Scholastic]].

The novel was later collected in ''[[Star Wars Trilogy: Collector's Edition]]'' ([[2005]]), ''[[Star Wars Boxed Set: Episodes I–VI]]'' ([[2007]]), and ''[[Star Wars: Classic Trilogy]]'' ([[2014]]). A revised, [[canon]] edition of the novel, [[Star Wars: A New Hope (paperback novel)|''Star Wars: A New Hope'']], was published in 2017.

==Publisher's summary==
''A long time ago in a galaxy far, far away....''

''A young Jedi is discovered. A rebellion grows. A deadly weapon unleashes its power. A master confronts his old apprentice. The journey begins a new chapter.''
